CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Continued To Mar-24-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.'s Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associate, LLC's unopposed Motion To Vacate Order on Settlement And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, the court orders any dismissal be vacated and judgment be entered. The court will enter judgment consistent with the proposed judgment, Exhibit A to the Langedyk Declaration.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the above text and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Moving Party is ordered to submit a proposed judgment identical to Exhibit A by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order or proposed judgment received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Moving party is required to prepare a proposed order and proposed judgment which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
